label: Tax Type
name: Sales Taxes and Charges Template-custom_tax_type
options:
Standard Rate
Zero Rate
Except Rate

label: Tax Type
name: Purchase Taxes and Charges Template-custom_tax_type
options:
Standard Rate
Zero Rate
Except Rate

label: Zero Rate Reason
name: Sales Taxes and Charges Template-custom_zero_rate_reason
options:
Export of goods(VATEX-SA-32)
Export of services(VATEX-SA-33)
The international transport of Goods(VATEX-SA-34-1)
International transport of passengers(VATEX-SA-34-2)
Services directly connected and incidental to a Supply of international passenger transport(VATEX-SA-34-3)
Supply of a qualifying means of transport(VATEX-SA-34-4)
Any services relating to Goods or passenger transportation, as defined in article twenty five of these Regulations(VATEX-SA-34-5)
Medicines and medical equipment(VATEX-SA-35)
Qualifying metals(VATEX-SA-36)
Private education to citizen(VATEX-SA-EDU)
Private healthcare to citizen(VATEX-SA-HEA)

label: Zero rate Reason
name: Purchase Taxes and Charges Template-custom_zero_rate_reason
options:
Export of goods(VATEX-SA-32)
Export of services(VATEX-SA-33)
The international transport of Goods(VATEX-SA-34-1)
International transport of passengers(VATEX-SA-34-2)
Services directly connected and incidental to a Supply of international passenger transport(VATEX-SA-34-3)
Supply of a qualifying means of transport(VATEX-SA-34-4)
Any services relating to Goods or passenger transportation, as defined in article twenty five of these Regulations(VATEX-SA-34-5)
Medicines and medical equipment(VATEX-SA-35)
Qualifying metals(VATEX-SA-36)
Private education to citizen(VATEX-SA-EDU)
Private healthcare to citizen(VATEX-SA-HEA)

label: Exempt Rate Reason
name: Sales Taxes and Charges Template-custom_except_rate_reason
options:
Financial services mentioned in Article 29 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-29)
Life insurance services mentioned in Article 29 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-29-7)
Real estate transactions mentioned in Article 30 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-30)

label: Except Rate Reason
name: Purchase Taxes and Charges Template-custom_except_rate_reason
options:
Financial services mentioned in Article 29 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-29)
Life insurance services mentioned in Article 29 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-29-7)
Real estate transactions mentioned in Article 30 of the VAT Regulations(VATEX-SA-30)

Credit
Bank Payment
Bank Card
